overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player character navigates wet streets and sidewalks beneath towering futuristic buildings and overpasses, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and holographic advertisements. The footage is clearly from a high-quality video game engine with cinematic lighting and atmospheric fog.

The camera moves past pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas and crosses a wet street with sparse vehicle traffic, while massive satellite dishes and neon billboards frame the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked cyberpunk plaza that gradually transitions into a dense, enclosed urban corridor. It begins by moving past pedestrians with glowing umbrellas and towering cylindrical buildings, crossing a wet street framed by massive satellite dishes and neon billboards. As the camera ascends to an elevated sidewalk with green metal railings, the open plaza shifts into a narrow urban canyon beneath a massive highway overpass where holographic pink billboards illuminate the rain. The scene then moves through a covered concrete shelter with diffused green lighting and a nearby parking garage before opening back up to a yellow-striped crosswalk at a busy intersection. Finally, the camera turns left past green street signs and graffiti-covered walls, moving toward a dense crowd of people gathered under purple neon signs near a building entrance.
